title: Minimal valid workflow — zip router fully disabled
q_summary: Another failure — YAML syntax error on line 87, Python heredoc breaking YAML parser.
a_summary: Root cause: Python heredoc with embedded colons inside run: | block was causing YAML parse failure at line 87. Also confirmed GitHub always runs workflow once when the file itself changes, regardless of trigger. Fix: stripped workflow to minimal valid 3-line no-op job. Full router logic preserved for future zip-bundle phase. This commit will trigger one final run which will pass cleanly.
decisions: Replaced full workflow body with single echo no-op step
Full router logic to be restored when zip-bundle delivery phase begins
